positive: A highly detailed linocut woodblock illustration of a symmetrical crescent moon cradling a dense, bioluminescent bouquet of fantasy flora and delicate, intertwining vine tendrils. The style must evoke vintage scientific botanical engravings, utilizing extreme black and white contrast with selective, subtle color accents of deep sapphire blue and metallic gold. Central composition, clean silhouettes, perfect symmetry, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Isolated on a minimalist, solid background.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, dirty, noise, grain, low resolution, poor quality, deformed, messy lines, photorealism, realistic colors
